## Options-strategy preview for Amazon ahead of earnings; no fundamental content

No fundamental signal; the piece confirms AMZN earnings are imminent and that options markets are pricing meaningful volatility — a prompt to ensure the earnings-review workflow is queued for AMZN.

- IBD published an options-strategy piece on AMZN framed around upcoming earnings.
- Coverage highlights expected 'big price swings' into the earnings print.
- Pure positioning and trading content; no new fundamental or business information in the headline.
- Confirms AMZN earnings are on the near-term horizon.
